temporal_description:
(00:00-00:03) In a dimly lit, dark interior, a man with a bandaged hand is shown in a close-up. His hand is held near his mouth, and his eyes are wide with a look of intense focus or fear. In the blurred background, another man's profile is visible, and a green, helmet-like object sits on a surface behind them. (Storyline: This opening shot establishes a tense and mysterious atmosphere, introducing a character who appears to be in a state of distress or high alert.) (Audio: 1) Tone of speech: Calm, narrative. 2) Background sounds or music: A low, ominous electronic hum.)
(00:04-00:08) The scene cuts to a different man with a beard, wearing a black shirt, speaking directly to the camera. He is in a dark, outdoor setting at night, with some foliage visible behind him. He recounts a story, mentioning a character named A Qiang. (Storyline: A new character is introduced, providing exposition. He is narrating a story about someone named A Qiang, explaining a significant event that happened five years ago.) (Audio: 1) Tone of speech: Serious, reflective. 2) Background sounds or music: The low, ominous hum continues.)
